about.title: Professional Profile
about.paragraph1: 4th-year Systems Engineering student at UTN Rosario with a hybrid profile across IT Support, Cybersecurity, Analysis, and Development. I have 2+ years of corporate support experience in 200+ user environments, improving resolution times by 40% while maintaining a 95% SLA.
about.paragraph2: I combine technical execution with business focus to optimize processes, automate workflows, and turn operational data into actionable decisions. I also helped modernize 80+ devices, reduced incidents by 35%, and trained 50+ users.
about.paragraph3: My current focus is to keep growing in Cybersecurity, Data/Functional Analysis, and Full Stack roles, applying solid architecture, role-based security, automated QA, and continuous improvement.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Full-stack development with modern architectures, REST APIs and relational databases.
projects.no_results: No projects found with the selected filters.
projects.alojarg.title: 🏨 AlojARG
projects.alojarg.subtitle: Booking System
projects.alojarg.description:
Seminar Integration Project: Complete system for managing and booking tourist accommodations in Argentina, developed as a final career project.
Technologies: .NET 9, Angular 20, TypeScript, MySQL, under Clean Architecture to keep code modular and scalable.
Key Features: RESTful API with JWT authentication and FluentValidation, integration with external hotel API (Makcorps), advanced search with dynamic filters, favorites system, property comparator and administrative dashboard.
Tools: Entity Framework Core for ORM, Swagger/OpenAPI for documentation, Docker Compose for container deployment.
This project strengthened knowledge in full stack development, scalable architecture and software engineering best practices.
projects.libros.title: 📚 BookCode
projects.libros.subtitle: Book Management System
projects.libros.description:
Software Development Project: BookCode is a complete full stack web system for book management and reviews, designed to provide an interactive and personalized user experience.
Technologies: Frontend with React, HTML and CSS; Backend with Node.js, Express and TypeScript; MySQL database with MikroORM ORM.
Functionalities: Multiple CRUD for users, books, authors, categories, publishers and sagas; review system with ratings and comments; personalized lists ("Read", "Pending", "See later"); personalized recommendations and review reactions.
Features: Secure authentication with JWT tokens, review moderation through external API for bad word detection, complex dependent relationships between entities, user activity tracking.
Project that included database design and normalization, modular backend construction, external API integration and Git/GitHub management.
projects.stock.title: 📦 Stock Management
projects.stock.description:
Software Development Project: Full stack stock management prototype, developed as an initial subject project to apply learned concepts.
Technologies: Frontend with React and TailwindCSS for modern UI; Backend with Node.js, Express and TypeScript; MySQL database integrated with Prisma ORM.
Functionalities: Complete CRUD of products and categories with dynamic filtering, real-time inventory control for accurate stock tracking.
Features: Complete database design and normalization, modular backend construction in TypeScript, Express server configuration, smooth Prisma integration for data operations.
This first full stack project consolidated knowledge in web development, application architecture and programming best practices.
projects.entornos.title: Graphic Environments TP
projects.entornos.subtitle: UTN academic project
projects.entornos.description:
UTN academic delivery repository: Official xampp_php implementation prepared for the Graphic Environments course using PHP + MySQL on XAMPP.
Technologies: HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, jQuery, framework-free PHP, MySQL and XAMPP.
Structure: Front controller and router in public/index.php, controllers/models/helpers/views in app, and SQL script in sql/schema.sql.
Functional scope: registration and login, sessions with $_SESSION, role-based CRUD, flight search with pagination, booking and cancellation, admin panel, CEO panel and email sending with local fallback.
A project focused on a complete academic delivery, with emphasis on MVC architecture, XAMPP integration and rubric compliance.
projects.vuelos.title: ✈️ Flight Management System
projects.vuelos.subtitle: Final Practical Work - Graphic Environments
projects.vuelos.description:
Academic full stack project: Web platform for flight operations, reservations, promotions, news, and operational reporting with role-based access control.
Architecture: The repository includes two equivalent implementations: a Node.js + Express REST API with static frontend, and a PHP MVC version designed for XAMPP.
Key features: authentication (JWT/session), reservation flow with 72-hour cancellation rule, airline and promotion administration with approval workflows, and sales/occupancy reporting.
Stack: Node.js, Express, MySQL, JWT, express-validator, PHP, Bootstrap 5, and vanilla JavaScript.
This project strengthened my experience in layered architecture, business rules, role-based security, and process-oriented development.
projects.fisica.title: 🚀 FISICA‑MODELO
projects.fisica.subtitle: Interactive p5.js simulations
projects.fisica.description: Interactive educational simulations: Collection of projects (fixed-wing airplane and drone) built with p5.js. Real-time visualizations of lift, drag and numeric panels (CL, CD, ρ). Includes interactive controls, flow visualization, data dashboards and Spanish tutorials explaining Bernoulli and Newton's laws.

courses.description: Continuous training and professional certifications that complement my technical development.
courses.course1.title: Excel Certification
courses.course1.description: Advanced training in Microsoft Excel, including formulas, pivot tables, data analysis, and automation with macros.
courses.course2.title: Artificial Intelligence for Cybersecurity
courses.course2.description: Application of AI and machine learning techniques in cybersecurity, including threat detection and vulnerability analysis.
courses.course3.title: Introduction to Cybersecurity
courses.course3.description: Cybersecurity fundamentals, data protection principles, and best practices in information security.
courses.course4.title: Cybersecurity Basics
courses.course4.description: Comprehensive cybersecurity training covering networking fundamentals and the OSI model, traffic analysis with Wireshark, WiFi security, secure protocols, Windows/Active Directory and Linux hardening, virtualization (VMs and Docker), cryptography (hashing, MFA, certificates, Zero Trust), and a risk-based, least-privilege mindset.
courses.course5.title: Network Basics
courses.course5.description: Networking fundamentals: models, IP addressing, connectivity, and basic troubleshooting in network infrastructure.
courses.course6.title: Network Defense
courses.course6.description: Network defense fundamentals, threat identification, traffic analysis, and security controls to protect enterprise infrastructure.
courses.course7.title: Endpoint Security
courses.course7.description: Endpoint protection through hardening, risk management, monitoring, and incident response across devices and workstations.
courses.course8.title: Cyber Threat Management
courses.course8.description: Cyber threat management focused on detection, vulnerability analysis, risk prioritization, and mitigation strategies.
courses.course9.title: Junior Cybersecurity Analyst Career Path
courses.course9.description: Career-oriented path for junior cybersecurity analysts combining networking, defense, endpoint security, and threat management skills.
courses.course19.title: Cybersecurity Defense Analyst Pathway Exam
courses.course19.description: Career-oriented path for cybersecurity defense analysts combining networking, defense, endpoint security, threat management, and operational response skills.
courses.course10.title: Networking Devices and Initial Configuration

courses.course11.title: Get Started with Lumu Free
courses.course11.description: Detection and response to network compromises in real-time. I learned about threat visibility, traffic analysis, and the importance of reducing detection time for incidents. Essential tools for strengthening security in today's environments.
courses.course12.title: Introduction to the Lumu Portal
courses.course12.description: Introduction to the Lumu platform and navigation of its main features. Understanding how to access and use the portal for threat monitoring and network compromise visualization.
courses.course13.title: How Lumu Works
courses.course13.description: Technical functioning of the Lumu platform. I learned about detection mechanisms, network behavior analysis, and how Lumu identifies and reports compromises in real-time.
courses.course14.title: Lumu Roaming Deployment
courses.course14.description: Deployment of Lumu's Roaming solution and how it extends visibility and detection across different network environments.
courses.course15.title: Lumu Email Intelligence
courses.course15.description: Using email intelligence to detect and analyze threats, strengthening visibility over email-based attack vectors.
courses.course16.title: Lumu Deployment Overview
courses.course16.description: Overview of the Lumu platform deployment and its main components for monitoring and compromise detection.
courses.course17.title: The Lumu SecOps Platform
courses.course17.description: Exploration of Lumu's SecOps platform, its operational approach, and the integration of detection with incident response.
courses.course18.title: Lumu Virtual Appliance Deployment
courses.course18.description: Deployment of the Lumu virtual appliance to enable monitoring, visibility, and analysis across the infrastructure.
